caseStudies.title: B-Smart Famalicão Case Study - Smart City Management Solution
caseStudies.description: B-Smart Famalicão uses City as a Platform as a data hub, integrating municipal sources to enable better decisions, transparency and stronger citizen participation.

caseStudies.title: Lisbon Case Study - Floods Data Catalogue
caseStudies.description: A flood data catalogue was developed for the city of Lisbon. Sources such as transport infrastructure and hydrogeology feed the catalogue.

caseStudies.title: Lagos Case Study - Urban Planning and Management Platform
caseStudies.description: “ The Municipality of Lagos, with the collaboration of Focus BC, developed an application for general and free access, with the territorial information of the Municipality of Lagos.."

caseStudies.title: Groupe Renault Case Study - Smart Factory Incident Management
caseStudies.description: Focus BC developed an integrated incident management system for Groupe Renault’s Cacia factory to report, track and resolve incidents.

caseStudies.title: GIRA Case Study - First Shared Bike Service in Lisbon
caseStudies.description: Focus BC supported EMEL’s GIRA bike sharing in Lisbon with real time monitoring of bikes and stations, alerts for faster action, and data insights for planning.

caseStudies.title: Choice Car Case Study - Routing Optimization Solution
caseStudies.description: Focus BC implemented WorkWave Route Manager for Choice Car to optimize routing for Bedriven and Rodinhas, improving real time management, ETAs and efficiency.

caseStudies.title: Lisbon Case Study - Traffic Closures Solution
caseStudies.description: Lisbon City Council used Focus BC’s platform to manage and share traffic closures with real time maps from Waze and Google, improving mobility and productivity.

caseStudies.title: Infralobo Case Study - Smart Resort Management
caseStudies.description: Focus BC developed Infralobo Smart Management to monitor Vale do Lobo services, improving efficiency, reducing costs and enabling public participation.

caseStudies.title: Delta Case Study - Salesforce Otimization in Traditional Retail
caseStudies.description: Focus BC conducted a consulting study for Delta Cafés to optimize salesforce operations, improving territories, boosting visits per day and reducing costs.

caseStudies.title: Chronopost Case Study - Pickup Network Optimization
caseStudies.description: Focus BC delivered geomarketing studies for Chronopost to optimize Pickup store expansion, improve coverage, and streamline logistics and partner onboarding.

caseStudies.title: GeoEstrela Case Study - Smart City Management Solution
caseStudies.description: Focus BC developed the GeoEstrela solution to manage incidents by linking citizens and services with real time reporting, status updates, metrics and lower costs.
